description: An aircraft manufacturer has identified a potential issue and needs to issue a non-mandatory Service Bulletin to operators recommending an inspection or modification.

nodes.task_description: Describe the potential issue and the reason for the recommended action.

expected_outcome.value: Agent writes a clear explanation of the problem.

nodes.task_description: Provide detailed, step-by-step instructions for the inspection or modification procedure.

expected_outcome.value: Agent authors a clear and unambiguous procedure for technicians.

nodes.task_description: Publish the Service Bulletin and distribute it to all registered owners and operators of the affected aircraft model.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully publishes and distributes the SB.
